pageIntro.title: Programs we are building for students now and next.
pageIntro.description: Free Code Juniors currently offers one active program and is preparing a second course focused on Python and stronger AI prompting skills.

sectionIntro.title: Current and upcoming learning experiences.
sectionIntro.description: Our current focus is building a strong foundation in block coding and AI inferencing while preparing a combined Python and intermediate prompting course.

programs.title: Introduction to Block Coding in Scratch and AI Inferencing
programs.description: Students begin with block coding in Scratch while learning how AI inferencing works through guided, beginner-friendly projects.

programs.title: Intro to Python and Intermediate Prompting Skills
programs.description: Students will learn Python fundamentals alongside intermediate prompting skills that strengthen problem solving, logic, and effective use of AI tools.
